mainEntity.name: What healthcare facilities does Dory's Cleaning serve in Massachusetts?

acceptedAnswer.text: We serve medical offices, specialty clinics (cardiology, dental, urgent care, dialysis), ambulatory and outpatient facilities, surgery centers, rehabilitation and nursing facilities, assisted living, and healthcare administrative offices across 109 Massachusetts cities.

mainEntity.name: Are you insured for healthcare facility cleaning?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We carry $2,000,000 in liability insurance. Our staff is certified in OSHA Bloodborne Pathogens (29 CFR 1910.1030), Infection Control, and ATP Bioluminescence Testing.

mainEntity.name: How can I request a free facility cleaning assessment?

acceptedAnswer.text: Call (978) 307-8107 or submit our online form. We respond within 24 hours and offer free on-site walkthroughs for Massachusetts healthcare facilities.
